product_overview: Admin web portal for SkyTalk: provides system overview, device management, talkgroup management, and a read-only user listing used by administrators to provision and monitor the relay system.
core_goals: Provide a clear system overview (devices online, total devices, active talkgroups) for operators
Enable administrators to list devices and toggle device active/inactive state
Let administrators create and view talkgroups and manage talkgroup membership
Expose a read-only user listing (username and role) for administrative audit
Surface failures and API errors to the user (avoid silently swallowed errors) and ensure accurate data from server endpoints

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Shows stat cards for devices online, total devices, active talkgroups, and a device status table to give operators a quick system snapshot.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View Devices Online count card -> View Total Devices count card -> View Active Talkgroups card (hardcoded to dash) -> View device status table with name, site, and online/offline badge -> App calls GET /devices -> See device status table populated
Navigate to /dashboard -> App calls GET /devices -> Server returns an error or stub crashes (C1) -> See device status table empty -> See no error message shown (fetch errors swallowed)

features.name: Device Management
features.description: List all registered devices and allow admins to toggle each device's active/inactive status.
user_flows: Navigate to /devices -> View device list table with serial, name, site columns -> Click Enable button to activate a disabled device -> App sends PATCH /devices/:id/status -> See updated device status after toggle
Navigate to /devices -> App calls GET /devices -> Server route stub crashes or returns error (C1) -> See blank device list -> See no error message shown (fetch errors swallowed)

Navigate to /devices -> View device list table with serial, name, site columns -> Click Disable button to deactivate an active device -> App sends PATCH /devices/:id/status -> Server returns error -> See device status unchanged -> See no error message shown

features.name: Talkgroup Management
features.description: List existing talkgroups and create new ones using a simple input and Create button.
user_flows: Navigate to /talkgroups -> View list of existing talkgroups -> Type a talkgroup name into the input field -> Click Create button to submit -> App sends POST /talkgroups -> See new talkgroup appear in the list
Navigate to /talkgroups -> Type an empty string into the talkgroup name input field -> Click Create button -> See client-side validation reject empty input (no empty name allowed)
Navigate to /talkgroups -> App calls GET /talkgroups -> Server returns error or stub crashes (C1) -> See empty talkgroup list -> See no error message shown (fetch errors swallowed)

features.name: User Listing
features.description: Read-only view of all registered users showing username and role labels to help admin audit accounts.
user_flows: Navigate to /users -> View user table with username and role columns -> See admin vs user role labels -> App calls GET /users
Navigate to /users -> App calls GET /users -> Server returns 404 (route not implemented, C4) -> See users page empty -> See no error message shown

routes.description: System overview — device counts and device status table
Device management — list devices, enable/disable each device
Talkgroup management — list talkgroups, create new talkgroup
User listing — read-only table of usernames and roles

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Shows stat cards for devices online, total devices, active talkgroups, and a device status table
user_interactions: View Active Talkgroups card (hardcoded to dash)
View device status table with name, site, and online/offline badge

features.name: Device Management
features.description: List all registered devices and toggle their active/inactive status
user_interactions: View device list table with serial, name, site columns
Click Enable button to activate a disabled device
Click Disable button to deactivate an active device
See updated device status after toggle

features.name: Talkgroup Management
features.description: List existing talkgroups and create new ones
user_interactions: Type a talkgroup name into the input field
See new talkgroup appear in the list
See empty input rejected (no empty name allowed)

features.name: User Listing
features.description: Read-only view of all registered users and their roles
user_interactions: View user table with username and role columns
See admin vs user role labels

known_limitations.issue: No login screen — portal renders all pages without auth; JWT must be manually set in localStorage
known_limitations.impact: Unauthenticated access to all admin pages; API calls sent with empty Bearer token

known_limitations.issue: All non-auth server routes use supabase stub (C1) — device, talkgroup, user endpoints return errors
known_limitations.impact: Dashboard, Devices, Talkgroups, Users pages all show empty data

known_limitations.issue: GET /users endpoint does not exist on server (C4) — Users page always gets 404
All fetch errors silently swallowed with .catch(() => {}) — no error messages shown to user
known_limitations.impact: Users see blank tables with no feedback when API calls fail

known_limitations.issue: Active Talkgroups stat on Dashboard is hardcoded to dash, not fetched from API
known_limitations.impact: Stat always shows placeholder value regardless of actual data
